(exp_par <- fitdistr(one, "exponential"))
(exp_par <- fitdistr(two, "exponential"))
(exp_par <- fitdistr(three, "exponential"))
(exp_par <- fitdistr(four, "exponential"))
(exp_par <- fitdistr(five, "exponential"))
(exp_par <- fitdistr(six, "exponential"))
